name: UBA : Suspicious Privileged Activity (First Observed Privilege Use)
notes: Indicates that a user executed a privileged action that they were never observed doing before. Observations are kept in "UBA : Observed Activities by Low Level Category and Username" map-of-sets.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Sense
when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Privileged Activity : UBA
when all of Low Level Category is the key and all of Username is the value in all of UBA : Observed Activities by Low Level Category and Username - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Suspicious Privileged Activity (First Observed Privilege Use) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the event category for the event is one of the following Sense
AND when an event matches all of the following UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Privileged Activity : UBA
AND NOT when all of Low Level Category is the key and all of Username is the value in all of UBA : Observed Activities by Low Level Category and Username - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Suspicious Privileged Activity (First Observed Privilege Use)

Event description: senseValue=5,senseDesc='Indicates that this is the first time observance of user performing a privileged act rarely observed from them.',usecase_id='9e46149e-fc43-4262-8a55-3db33f1c10a0'
Add "userName" to Reference Map Of Sets: "UBA : Observed Activities by Low Level Category and Username" with key "category"
